response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio is conversational speech and does not contain vocal music, matching the reference JSON's analysis. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON provided no lyrics as there is no music; manual transcription and translation were performed for the entire clip. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to vocal starts, with durations kept tight to match the VTuber's energetic and sometimes rapid commentary.

subtitles.original: だけどこれちゃんと透けるのかなって結構ね、心配してたんだけど
subtitles.english: But I was actually quite worried about whether these would really turn translucent...
...but I think it's gonna work out.
No, I'm not going for "amber" onions.

subtitles.original: 今日はね、飴色玉ねぎじゃないっぽい
subtitles.english: Looks like today's not for amber onions.
Well, I'm going to simmer them anyway.

subtitles.original: スケルトン玉ねぎにします、今日は
ちょっと薄めにこうやって敷いて、透けてるかどうかを
subtitles.english: I'll spread them out a bit thin like this and see if they're translucent...

subtitles.original: 見えるようにしつつ、次のものを用意しとこうかな
subtitles.english: ...while keeping an eye on that, and I'll get the next things ready.

subtitles.original: えー、にんにく、生姜、トマトピューレ
えー、にんにく、生姜はね、これいつもあの、こよりが飲んでる...
subtitles.english: Um, garlic, and for ginger... it's the ginger I always put in...

subtitles.original: 蜂蜜生姜紅茶に入れてる生姜ね
と、トマトピューレ。は買ってきた。よし
subtitles.english: And tomato puree. I bought some. Alright.

subtitles.original: これトマトピューレがさ、100gなんだけどさ
200gしか売ってなくて、この残った100gをどうすればいいんだろう...
subtitles.english: ...but they only sold 200g packs. I'm wondering what to do with the remaining 100g...

subtitles.original: っていうのに悩んでるのと、どうやって100gを計ればいいのかが分からなくて
subtitles.english: ...and I don't know how I should measure out 100g.

subtitles.original: こよりさ、昔さ、あの、ケーキ作りしたじゃん
subtitles.english: You know, I once made a cake a while back.

subtitles.original: そう、ケーキ作りの時に絶対に、あの、買ったはずなの
subtitles.english: Yeah, I'm sure I must have bought...

subtitles.original: どこ行ったんだろうなー、マジで
subtitles.english: Where could it have gone, seriously?

subtitles.original: あ！あれだ！あった！ちょっと待って、あった！
subtitles.english: Ah! That's it! I found it! Wait a sec, I found it!

subtitles.original: よしじゃあ、最初の仕込みの時のヨーグルトもこれで計れたんだ
subtitles.english: Alright then, I could have measured the yogurt for the initial prep with this too.
There we go, there we go.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、よいしょ。測って...
やべぇ、椅子に付いてる猫の毛がめっちゃ、めっちゃ手に移った。待って
subtitles.english: Oh no, the cat hair from my chair is getting all over my hands. Wait.

subtitles.original: 玉ねぎ...あ、やばい！飴色になっちゃう！
subtitles.english: The onions... Oh no! They're turning amber!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、ちょっと、ちょっと弱火にしよ
subtitles.english: Hold on, I'll turn the heat down a bit.

subtitles.original: なんで透明になる前に飴色になるの？どうして？
subtitles.english: Why are they turning amber before becoming transparent? Why?
I wonder if it has batteries.

subtitles.original: あ、あったあったあった。まあその時しか使ってないからそりゃなくなってないよね。よし
subtitles.english: Oh, found some. Well, I only used it that one time, so they shouldn't be dead. Alright.

subtitles.original: これね、タニタさんのやつね
subtitles.english: This one, it's the Tanita one.

subtitles.original: で、この、お米の計量カップに100g計ると
subtitles.english: Then, I'll measure 100g in this rice measuring cup.
This is bad, this is bad.
Um, it's 17g, so I'll go up to 117.

subtitles.original: 蓋のとこに付いちゃった
あ、まあ110...あーあー、すごいボトボト。ボトボト落ちてます
subtitles.english: Ah, well 110... Oh man, it's dripping everywhere. It's dripping down.

subtitles.original: あ、待って。ちょ、ちょっと切っとこ。やばい、焦げ始めた、焦げ始めた！
subtitles.english: Oh, wait. Let me turn it off for a second. Oh no, it's starting to burn, it's burning!

subtitles.original: なんか現場みたいになっちゃった
subtitles.english: It's like a crime scene in here.

subtitles.original: で、電池もったいないから切りして、で、これは一旦
subtitles.english: And, turning it off so I don't waste the batteries, and I'll put this aside for now.

subtitles.original: こっちに置いて。そしたらですね
やばい、焦げ始めている。ま、でも大丈夫、飴色って言うからね
subtitles.english: Oh no, it's starting to burn. Well, but it's okay, I'll just call it "amber".

subtitles.original: えっと、にんにくと生姜を
本当は本物をって書いてあるけど
subtitles.english: The recipe says fresh ones, but...

subtitles.original: ま、おろしてるやつで。どれぐらいか分かんない、一欠片ぐらい
subtitles.english: ...well, I'll use the grated ones. I don't know how much, about one clove's worth.

subtitles.original: 生姜。ちょ、やばい。蜂蜜生姜紅茶よう飲んでるから、ちょ、生姜がほぼほぼない
subtitles.english: Ginger. Oh, wait. I drink honey ginger tea so often that there's almost no ginger left.

subtitles.original: よいしょ、これ無くなったら買いに行かんと。これ入れるだけでね、なんかあの...
subtitles.english: There, I'll have to go buy some when I'm out. Just adding this, you know...

subtitles.original: 紅茶がすごいレベルが上がったみたいな風になるからおすすめです。市販品で行けるからね
subtitles.english: ...it makes the tea feel like it's leveled up, so I recommend it. You can just use store-bought stuff.

subtitles.original: で、これとトマトピューレを足す
subtitles.english: Now, add this and the tomato puree.

subtitles.original: 2g多かった分、これ残る分でちょうどいいか。えー、ちょ、待って
subtitles.english: Since it was 2g too much, maybe it'll balance out with what stays in the cup. Wait...

subtitles.original: そう、これトマトピューレ入れるタイプだから
subtitles.english: Yeah, this is the type where you add tomato puree.

subtitles.original: そしたらこれを混ぜます
トマトが入ると急にそれっぽくなるね
subtitles.english: It suddenly looks more like it once the tomato is in.

subtitles.original: そしたらですね、ここに...
さっき漬けといた鶏肉
鶏肉に、この、トマトと玉ねぎを絡めていく
subtitles.english: ...and coat the chicken with this tomato and onion mixture.

subtitles.original: あ、いい匂い！めっちゃいい匂いする
subtitles.english: Ah, what a great smell! It smells so good.

subtitles.original: 鶏肉がね、結構大きいから
subtitles.english: The chicken pieces are quite big,

subtitles.original: ちゃんとね、火を通さないとね
subtitles.english: ...so I have to make sure they're cooked through.

subtitles.original: そしたらですね、ここにスパイスを入れていくよ
subtitles.english: And then, I'll add the spices here.

subtitles.original: クミン、コリアンダー、ターメリック
